# Cross-language golden vectors for the flat codec: <name>=<hex>, where <hex>
# is the byte image the Rust ls-pc-abi encoder produces for a canonical payload
# instance. Regenerate with the throwaway `cargo run --example codec_vectors`
# in crates/ls-pc-abi if the wire format changes. CodecSuite asserts the Java
# codec decodes each vector to the expected fields AND re-encodes the equivalent
# Java instance to these exact bytes.
